name: AEMETIS, INC
summary: Aemetis, Inc. is an international renewable natural gas and renewable fuels company founded in 2006 and headquartered in Cupertino, California. The company operates a 65 million gallon per year ethanol plant in Keyes, CA; produces renewable natural gas (RNG) from dairy digesters in central California; and operates an 80 million gallon per year biodiesel plant in Kakinada, India. It also develops sustainable aviation fuel, renewable diesel, and carbon capture projects.
